Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We need to produce the Python code to construct an accepting Petri net for the described scenario

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to place tokens for initial marking and final marking as per the example initial marking at start place final marking at sink place

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: We will create places representing states between activities likely we need a place per activity and perhaps also places for start end and some conditions

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: List of activities Claim Registration CR Document Verification DV Fraud Check FC Claim Assessment CA Approval AP Payment P Notification N Closure CL Also we might need places for loops after DV if incomplete leads to RDS after FC if doubts leads to II which can happen multiple times before CA

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Simplify We will have a place for each activity plus maybe a place for Re Document Submission and In depth Investigation Probably we need arcs labeled with activity names connecting places

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Thus we can define places p_start source p_CR p_DV p_FC p_CA p_AP p_P p_N p_CL also maybe p_RDS p_II p_end sink Or we can embed these as part of the flow

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: We will then add arcs p_start to p_CR label Claim Registration p_CR to p_DV label Document Verification p_DV to p_FC label Fraud Check p_FC to p_CA label Claim Assessment p_CA to p_AP label Approval p_AP to p_P label Payment p_P to p_N label Notification p_N to p_CL label Closure p_CL to p_end maybe not needed but to close

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: If documents incomplete after DV go back to p_RDS label Re Document Submission then from p_RDS back to p_DV to try verification again maybe loop So we can add arcs p_DV to p_RDS label Re Document Submission and p_RDS to p_DV label Document Verification retry

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: If FC raises doubts go to p_II label In depth Investigation and from p_II back to p_FC multiple times before proceeding to CA So we add arcs p_FC to p_II label In depth Investigation and p_II to p_FC label Fraud Check retry multiple times

Name: Validation - IND
Text: We need to ensure to remove sink place In example they removed sink place from net and deleted marking They did petri utils remove place net sink then del fm sink But we are using p_end as sink we could similarly remove place and delete marking if needed

Name: Abductive Reasoning - IND
Text: The problem statement did not require us to do that but we can follow pattern
